mapper.select: SELECT CAST(d.device_id AS CHAR) AS value, CONCAT(d.device_name, ' (', COALESCE(d.device_code, '-'), ')') AS label FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.update_time DESC, d.device_id DESC
SELECT d.device_id AS deviceId, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.bind_dept_id AS deptId, d.bind_dept_name AS deptName FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(u.real_name, ''), u.user_name) FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ecg_device_quality_control ( qc_id, device_id, device_name, dept_id, dept_name, test_time, test_type, test_user_id, test_user_name, device_status, test_result, remark, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{qcId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceName}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{testTime}, #{testType}, #{testUserId}, #{testUserName}, #{deviceStatus}, #{testResult}, #{remark}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_device_quality_control SET device_id = #{deviceId}, device_name = #{deviceName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, dept_name = #{deptName}, test_time = #{testTime}, test_type = #{testType}, test_user_id = #{testUserId}, test_user_name = #{testUserName}, device_status = #{deviceStatus}, test_result = #{testResult}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE qc_id = #{qcId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT q.qc_id AS qcId, q.device_id AS deviceId, q.device_name AS deviceName, q.dept_id AS deptId, q.dept_name AS deptName, q.test_time AS testTime, q.test_type AS testType, q.test_user_id AS testUserId, q.test_user_name AS testUserName, q.device_status AS deviceStatus, q.test_result AS testResult, q.remark AS remark, q.create_time AS createTime, q.update_time AS updateTime FROM ecg_device_quality_control q WHERE q.qc_id = #{qcId} AND q.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
